steps.title: Substitute x equals 7 into the function
steps.content: We need to find $f(7)$ where $f(x) = 5x^2$. Substitute $x = 7$ into the function: $$f(7) = 5(7)^2$$

steps.title: Evaluate the expression
steps.content: Evaluate the exponent: $(7)^2 = 49$. Then multiply by 5: $$f(7) = 5 \cdot 49 = 245$$ That matches choice D — D is correct.
